description: LTHCS V2.1 universe — full DJIA 30 + NASDAQ-100 + S&P 100, deduped to 169 unique tickers with v1.1.0 maturity-stage split. Includes pre-profit (LCID) and recovery (INTC, BA, GE) test cases. — Wave A expansion 2026-05-21 (+50)
